evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Validating data quality and ensuring compliance with data protection regulations; CI/CD; infrastructure as code
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-focused: emphasis on data quality validation, compliance (GDPR), and DevOps/infrastructure governance.
evidence.domain_risk: Pluxee (formerly Sodexo benefits) operates in HR benefits/employment; moderate domain risk.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: benefits platform, lacks explicit financial/regulatory language in available JD.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (Azure Data Factory, Spark, Star Schema, Slowly Changing Dimensions), established infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: Developing robust data pipelines using Azure Data Factory, PySpark, Python, SQL/NoSQL databases, and REST APIs
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical stack (Azure DF, PySpark, REST APIs, SCD) named with clear application.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on building data pipelines and infrastructure for internal consumption, not external commercial/product audiences.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role receives business requirements and delivers solutions — execution-focused, not strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-infrastructure expected; reference to machine learning is in desirable skills only.
evidence.testing_framing: Validating data quality and ensuring compliance with data protection regulations
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality and compliance validation framed as owned accountability in core responsibilities.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Validating data quality; compliance with data protection regulations

evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Collaborating with business teams to understand requirements and translate them into solutions
